GPU only. Macro scale. One script covers 3 experiments: macro/sole_critical_path/run_all_critical.py. Submit via gpu_queue.py. Harvest results from
  results/sole_critical_path/. Write PAPER.md for each. Follow GPU_CODING_GUIDELINES.md.

sole_critical_path: 3 experiments (poisoned_detection, ppl_probe, sole_vs_monolithic). MATH.md + SPEC.md at macro/sole_critical_path/. Script exists: run_all_critical.py. CAVEAT: Exp3 uses unscaled SOLE — validate with 1/N if killed.

resubmitted run_all_critical_1773916367 after killing dual-submission OOM. Fixed: memory leak in exp1 (del base_model before LOO), 1/N scaling in exp3 (was unscaled). 3 exps: poisoned_detection, ppl_probe, sole_vs_monolithic. est 65-90min.

resubmitted run_all_critical_1773916491 after prior submission lost (queue dir wiped). Fixed NameError bug (del base_model on already-deleted var). 3 exps: poisoned_detection, ppl_probe, sole_vs_monolithic. est 65-90min on A5000.

Exp 3 (monolithic) failed: PyTorch set_submodule compat issue with BitsAndBytesConfig. Fixed: switched to bf16 (no quantization) + gradient checkpointing. Resubmitted as run_all_critical_1773936723. Est completion ~16:50 UTC. Do NOT re-check before 16:45 UTC.

Exp 3 (monolithic): OOM due to zombie GPU process (16.3GB). Added kill_zombie_gpu_processes() preamble to script. Resubmitted as run_all_critical_1773936941. Est completion ~17:50 UTC. Do NOT re-check before 17:50 UTC.

Exp 3 (monolithic): Task 1773936723 still running (GPU 92%, 16763 MiB). Queue lost tracking but process alive. No DONE entry, no results file yet. Started 16:13 UTC, est completion 16:33-16:48 UTC. Do NOT re-check before 20min from now.

SOLE Critical Path: All 3 experiments complete. Exp1 LOO=SUPPORTED (all 5 positive), Exp2 PPL-Probe=SUPPORTED (+0.27%), Exp3 Monolithic WINS (PPL 1.99 vs SOLE 2.64, +32.7% gap). PAPER.md updated. Ready for adversarial review.

SOLE Critical Path (macro/sole_critical_path): 5 fixes required. (1) Flag bf16-vs-NF4 training confound in Exp3 as major caveat — 32.7% gap partially reflects precision difference, use SUPPORTED not KILLED. (2) Add headline finding: 1/N scaling resolves composition catastrophe (PPL trillions→2.36, 10^12x improvement). (3) Mark K2 for exp_poisoned_adapter_detection as N/A not FAIL — no poisoned adapter under 1/N scaling. (4) Note calibration set size differences across experiments (30/10/25 samples). (5) Add per-domain PPL for Exp3 or flag as blocking gap for K1 evaluation.

SOLE Critical Path: 5 review fixes applied. PAPER.md revised with headline 1/N scaling finding, bf16-vs-NF4 confound caveat, K2 N/A for poisoned detection, calibration set differences noted, per-domain PPL flagged as blocking gap. HYPOTHESES.yml: exp_sole_vs_monolithic_v2 and exp_poisoned_adapter_detection both set to SUPPORTED.

SOLE Critical Path: 3 experiments PROCEED. 1/N scaling resolves composition catastrophe (PPL trillions→2.36). LOO ranking works. Monolithic wins aggregate (+32.7% confounded). exp_sole_vs_monolithic_v2, exp_poisoned_adapter_detection, exp_ppl_probe_macro_composition all SUPPORTED. Per-domain PPL flagged as next blocking gap.
